Hacker News 日报

日期 2026-07-20，轻量 JSON 保留每篇前 20 条高位评论。

#1

Kimi K3：开放前沿智能

Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence

2088 分 1205 评论 最高 #70 9 次快照出现
  • Today, we are introducing Kimi K3 — our most capable model. Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model built on our Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals, with native vision capabilities and a 1-million-token context window. It is the world's first open 3T-class model, designed for frontier intelligence across long-horizon coding, knowledge work, and reasoning. While its overall performance still trails the most powerful proprietary models, Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol, Kimi K3 demonstrated frontier-level performance across our evaluation suite, consistently outperforming other tested models.
  • Kimi K3 is available today on Kimi.com, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, and the Kimi API. At launch, Kimi K3 will use max thinking effort by default, with low- and high-effort modes to be introduced in subsequent updates. We are currently working closely with inference partners and open-source maintainers to align technical details and ensure a reliable rollout across the ecosystem. The full model weights will be released by July 27, 2026. Further details on the architecture, training, and evaluations will be released alongside the Kimi K3 technical report. An Open 3T-Class Model Kimi K3 is the first open model to reach 2.8 trillion parameters. It marks the latest step in Kimi's sustained push at the scaling frontier: for nine of the past twelve months, Kimi models have set the upper bound of open-model sizes.
HN 原帖 完整评论 JSON
#2

展示 HN：我用1600美元的ESP32替换了一套价值12万美元的保龄球馆系统

Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s

2705 分 307 评论 最高 #1 16 次快照出现
  • 一位SRE工程师用ESP32和开源技术栈替换了价值12万美元的保龄球计分系统，成本仅1600美元。
  • 系统采用ESPNow星型网状拓扑，结合Redis状态机和React前端，实现实时事件流和自定义UI。
  • 项目名为OpenLaneLink，计划开源硬件、固件和软件栈，打破厂商锁定，降低保龄球馆运营成本。
HN 原帖 完整评论 JSON
#3

AWS：预估账单数据不准确——17亿美元

AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion

1305 分 752 评论 最高 #56 9 次快照出现
  • AWS出现账单数据异常，有用户预估费用高达17亿美元，而正常月费用不足5美元
  • 用户已提交紧急工单，Reddit上也有类似反馈，疑似AWS计费系统故障

  • 此举引发用户对硬件厂商与操作系统更新机制安全性的担忧。

#5

通义千问 3.8

Qwen 3.8

925 分 656 评论 最高 #1 18 次快照出现
  • 阿里巴巴宣布 Qwen 3.8 大模型即将发布并开源，参数规模达 2.4T。
  • 该模型性能对标国际前沿 AI 模型，仅次于 Fable 5。
  • Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 已在阿里云 Token Plan、Qoder 和 QoderWork 平台上线供用户体验。

#6

Claude Code 现已采用 Rust 编写的 Bun。

Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now

584 分 788 评论 最高 #3 18 次快照出现
  • Claude Code v2.1.181 及之后版本已采用 Rust 重写的 Bun 作为运行时。
  • Simon Willison 通过二进制字符串分析验证了 Claude Code 使用了尚未正式发布的 Bun v1.4.0 预览版。
  • 此次迁移使 Linux 上启动速度提升约 10%，整体变化较为平稳。
HN 原帖 完整评论 JSON
#7

Kimi K3 时刻

The Kimi K3 Moment

618 分 598 评论 最高 #4 18 次快照出现
  • I’ve been running Kimi K3 alongside Claude on my normal coding work, and for all practical purposes I can’t tell them apart. Same tasks, same quality of output, and near identical token counts to get there. I expected an open model to be sloppier or to grind through more tokens on the way to the same answer, and neither turned out to be true.
  • The prices are nowhere near each other. K3’s API runs $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million output. Claude’s top model costs $10 and $50 for the same units. The subscription side is even more lopsided. Kimi’s paid plans start at $19 a month, and the $39 coding tier is far more generous than anything Claude sells anywhere near that price. Claude’s plans are metered tightly enough that a normal day of agent work can chew through the allowance before lunch.
HN 原帖 完整评论 JSON

#9

GPT-5.6利用提示词填补了凸优化领域长达30年的空白。

GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization

595 分 390 评论 最高 #5 17 次快照出现
  • GPT-5.6 通过提示词技术解决了凸优化领域长达 30 年的难题。
  • 该成果源自 OpenAI CDC 证明公告后的后续研究，展示了大模型在数学证明与优化问题上的潜力。
